instructions.text: Turn right onto South Bay Harbor Trail
Turn slight left onto Pierre Lallement Bike Path
Arrive at your destination, on the left

Arrive at your destination, on the left

Continue straight onto South Bay Harbor Trail

Arrive at your destination, on the left
